title: Argentinian Smoky Burger
description: A classic Argentinian-inspired burger with smoky flavor and zesty kick.

ingredients.name: Smoky Burger Patty
ingredients.notes: Made with ground beef and smoky spices

ingredients.name: Argentinian Salsa
ingredients.notes: A zesty mix of onions, tomatoes, and spices

ingredients.name: Zesty Mayo
ingredients.notes: A tangy mayonnaise infused with zesty spices

ingredients.name: Argentinian Bread
ingredients.notes: Soft, crusty bread with a hint of spice

ingredients.name: Lettuce
ingredients.notes: Fresh, crisp lettuce for a crunchy bite

ingredients.name: Tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Fresh, juicy tomatoes for added flavor

ingredients.name: Red Onion
ingredients.notes: Thinly sliced red onion for a sweet crunch

ingredients.name: Cheddar Cheese
ingredients.notes: Melted cheddar cheese for a creamy touch

ingredients.name: Smoked Bacon
ingredients.notes: Crispy smoked bacon for added smokiness

ingredients.name: Smoky BBQ Sauce
ingredients.notes: Thick, smoky BBQ sauce for a sweet and tangy glaze

instructions: Form beef patties and season with smoky spices.
Grill patties for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked to desired level of doneness.
Meanwhile, toast buns on the grill.
Assemble burgers with patty, cheese, bacon, lettuce, tomato, and onion.
Drizzle with zesty mayo and smoky BBQ sauce.
